name: megalodon-attack-test
description: Test fixture for May 18, 2026 Megalodon GitHub-repo backdooring campaign. Combines (a) the contaminated @tiledesk/tiledesk-server@2.18.6 npm version published from a backdoored Tiledesk repo, and (b) the SysDiag workflow file under .github/workflows/ that exercises check_megalodon_indicators. The synthetic workflow is inert.
